workflow.name: Build a Telegram AI chatbot with human takeover using Trilox and GPT-4o-mini
workflow.description:
![telegramhumantakeover.jpeg](fileId:4389)
> ⚠️ This template uses the Trilox community node (n8n-nodes-trilox) and requires self-hosted n8n.

## Who is this for

n8n developers building Telegram chatbots who need to take over from the bot when it fails — without the customer getting double replies.

## How it works

1. Customer sends a message on Telegram (text or voice)
2. The message is recorded to Trilox and the handler status is checked
3. If the bot is in control → the AI Agent responds with a structured escalation flag
4. After the AI responds, the handler is checked again — catching the race condition where a human took over while the AI was thinking
5. If the AI decides a human is needed → the conversation is escalated and the customer is notified
6. A human takes over from the Trilox inbox → the bot goes completely silent
7. The human replies from Trilox → the reply is forwarded to Telegram
8. Human hands back → bot resumes automatically

## How to set up

1. Install the Trilox community node (Settings → Community Nodes → Install `n8n-nodes-trilox`)
2. Create a free account at [trilox.io](https://trilox.io)
3. Create a Project → App (inbox) → API Key in Trilox
4. Create a Telegram bot via [@BotFather](https://t.me/botfather) and get the API token
5. Set up credentials for Trilox, Telegram, and OpenAI in n8n
6. In all Trilox nodes, select your App from the dropdown
7. Update the AI Agent system prompt with your business info and escalation rules
8. Activate the workflow

## Requirements

- Self-hosted n8n (community nodes required)
- Trilox account ([trilox.io](https://trilox.io)) — free plan available
- Telegram Bot (via [@BotFather](https://t.me/botfather))
- OpenAI API key (or any LLM provider)

## How to customize

- **Escalation rules:** Edit the system prompt to define when `is_human_required` should be true (refunds, complaints, billing)
- **Different LLM:** Replace OpenAI with OpenRouter, Anthropic, or any compatible model
- **Add channels:** The Channel Router has placeholders for WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Widget, and API
- **Remove voice:** Delete the voice branch if you don't need it
- **Add knowledge base:** Give the AI Agent tools (Google Docs, Notion, vector store)

workflow.name: Telegram AI Chatbot with Human Takeover using Trilox

options.systemMessage:
You are a friendly AI assistant for "TechHub" — an online electronics store.

Always respond in **valid JSON** following this exact schema:
{
  "message": "your reply to the customer",
  "is_human_required": false
}

Keep your tone friendly and concise (1–3 sentences).

---

**Business Info:**
- Hours: Monday–Friday 9 AM–6 PM, Saturday 10 AM–4 PM (EST)
- Shipping: Free over $50 (5–7 days), Express $15 (2–3 days)
- Products: smartphones, laptops, headphones, chargers, cases
- Warranty: 1-year manufacturer warranty
- Support email: user@example.com

---

**Escalation Rules (when is_human_required = true):**
- Customer requests a refund or return
- Customer has a complaint about an order
- Customer asks about order status (you don't have access to orders)
- Any topic you're unsure about — better to escalate than guess wrong

**Never escalate for:**
- General questions about hours, shipping, products, warranty

---

**Examples:**

User: "What are your hours?"
{"message": "We're open Monday–Friday 9 AM–6 PM and Saturday 10 AM–4 PM EST!", "is_human_required": false}

User: "I want a refund"
{"message": "I'll connect you with a team member who can help with your refund right away.", "is_human_required": true}

---

⚠️ TEMPLATE NOTE: Replace this entire prompt with your own business info and escalation rules.
The structured JSON output format must stay the same — the workflow depends on it.

parameters.text:
Thank you for your patience! A team member will be with you shortly.
— System Message

parameters.content:
## 🤖 Telegram AI Chatbot with Human Takeover

A complete Telegram chatbot with AI responses, real-time monitoring, and human takeover — powered by **Trilox**.

When the bot can't help (or says something wrong), a human can take over from the **Trilox inbox**. The bot goes silent. The human replies. When done, the bot takes back control.

No double replies. No embarrassing bot messages while you're trying to help a customer.

### How it works
1. Customer sends a message on Telegram (text or voice)
2. Message is recorded to **Trilox** and the handler is checked
3. If bot is in control → AI Agent responds using structured output
4. After AI responds, handler is checked **again** (catches race conditions)
5. If the AI decides a human is needed → conversation is escalated in **Trilox**
6. Human takes over from the Trilox inbox → bot goes completely silent
7. Human replies from Trilox → message is forwarded to customer via Telegram
8. Human hands back to bot → bot resumes responding

### ⚠️ How to set up
- [ ] Install the **Trilox community node** before importing (`n8n-nodes-trilox`)
- [ ] Create a free account at [trilox.io](https://trilox.io)
- [ ] Create a Project → App (inbox) → API Key in Trilox
- [ ] Create a Telegram bot via [@BotFather](https://t.me/botfather)
- [ ] In n8n, set up credentials for Trilox and Telegram
- [ ] In all Trilox nodes, select your App (inbox) from the dropdown
- [ ] Connect your LLM (OpenAI, OpenRouter, Anthropic, etc.)
- [ ] Update the AI Agent system prompt for your business
- [ ] **Test it:** Message your bot → check the Trilox inbox → take over → reply

### Requirements
- Trilox account ([trilox.io](https://trilox.io)) — free plan available
- Telegram Bot (via @BotFather)
- OpenAI or any LLM provider

### How to customize
- **Your business:** Change the system prompt with your FAQ, products, and escalation rules
- **Escalation rules:** Edit the prompt to define when `is_human_required` should be true (refunds, complaints, complex questions)
- **Other channels:** Replace Telegram trigger with WhatsApp/Messenger — update the channel field in Trilox nodes
- **Remove voice support:** Delete the voice branch if you don't need it
- **Multi-channel:** The agent reply router already has placeholders for WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Widget, and API

**Need help?** Join our Discord: [discord.gg/g9e6YTqmUs](https://discord.gg/g9e6YTqmUs)

## 1️⃣ Message Intake
Receive Telegram messages and normalize them into a single text field.

**Text messages** → extracted directly
**Voice messages** → downloaded and transcribed via OpenAI Whisper (requires OpenAI API key)
**Other types** → ignored (fallback)

💡 Don't need voice support? Delete the voice branch and connect Text → Merge directly.

## 2️⃣ Record & Check Handler
Log the visitor message to **Trilox**, then check who's handling this conversation.

**Check Handler** returns `handlerType`:
- `bot` → AI Agent responds
- `awaiting_human` → Send "someone will reply soon"
- `assigned_human` → Bot stays completely silent

## 3️⃣ Bot Handler
AI Agent generates a response with structured output:
```json
{
 "message": "reply text",
 "is_human_required": true/false
}
```

**Critical:** After AI responds, we check the handler **again**.
Why? The AI may take 5-30 seconds to think. If a human took over during that time, we suppress the bot reply. This prevents the **double-reply problem**.

If `is_human_required` is true → **Escalate to Human** in Trilox.

## 4️⃣ Awaiting Human
Conversation has been escalated but no human has picked it up yet.

Send the customer a courtesy message and log it to Trilox.

## 5️⃣ Human Agent Reply
**Trilox Trigger** fires when a human replies from the Trilox inbox.

The **Channel Router** checks which platform the conversation is on and forwards the human's reply to the correct channel.

All supported channels have placeholder outputs — connect your WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, or Widget nodes as needed.

## 🧪 Quick Test

1. Activate this workflow
2. Message your Telegram bot: **"Hi, what are your hours?"**
3. Open Trilox inbox → you should see the conversation
4. Message: **"I need a refund"** → bot escalates to human
5. In Trilox inbox, click **Take Over**
6. Reply from Trilox → customer receives your message on Telegram
7. Click **Hand Back to Bot** → bot resumes

Congratulations — you have a production-ready chatbot with human takeover! 🎉

💡 **Other channels** are not connected in this template. The placeholder outputs are here so you can quickly add WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, or Widget support by connecting the appropriate send nodes.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
